revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八王子]][[uk:Хатіодзі]]
==Religion== The term '''Hachiōji''' (八王子) refers to the eight {{ill|prince deities|ja|王子神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prince deities|1=Ōji-no-Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11573000}} or their {{ill|retinue|ja|眷属|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/retinue|1=Retinue (religion)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11583697}}, or shrines that enshrine them.<ref name="koj">''{{ill|Kōjien|en|Kōjien|qid=Q1192611|lt=Kōjien|1=Kōjien}}'' Fifth Edition, entry "Hachiōji"</ref> alternate_name include Dai-Hachiōji, Hachidaiōji, Hachininōji, and Hachidaidōji. Originally a Buddhist term, it was transmitted to Shinto through {{ill|Shinbutsu-shūgō|en|Shinbutsu-shūgō|qid=Q2279088|lt=Shinbutsu-shūgō|1=Shinbutsu-shūgō}}.<ref name="kokushi">''{{ill|Kokushi Daijiten (Shōwa period)|ja|国史大辞典|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokushi Daijiten (Shōwa period)|1=National History Encyclopedia|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6426904}}'' p.586, entry "Hachiōji"</ref> * {{ill|Hachiōji Gongen|ja|八王子権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji Gongen|qq=}}: The eight sons of {{ill|Gozu Tennō|en|Gozu Tennō|qid=Q11570247|lt=Gozu Tennō|1=Gozu Tennō}} in {{ill|Gion cult|en|Gion cult|qid=Q11588425|lt=Gion faith|1=Gion Faith}}<ref name="koj"/>. * The five male and three female deities who appeared during the {{ill|Vow of Amaterasu and Susanoo|ja|アマテラスとスサノオの誓約|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Vow of Amaterasu and Susanoo|1=Five Male and Three Female Deities|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11284880}}<ref name="koj"/>. In the {{ill|Honji suijaku|en|Honji suijaku|qid=Q3080781|lt=honji suijaku|1=Honji suijaku}} theory, they were identified with Hachiōji Gongen, leading to changes in the {{ill|enshrined kami|ja|祭神の変更|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrined kami|1=Changes to deities in the Meiji period|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11591102}}. * The fourth shrine among the seven {{ill|Sannō|ja|山王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannō|1=Sannō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11470026}} shrines of {{ill|Mount Hiei|en|Mount Hiei|qid=Q748040|lt=Mount Hiei|1=Mount Hiei}}<ref name="koj"/>. * The eight sons born before the renunciation of {{ill|Nichigatsu Tōmyō Butsu|ja|日月灯明仏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nichigatsu Tōmyō Butsu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, one of the 20,000 {{ill|Sun and Moon Light Buddha|ja|日月燈明佛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sun and Moon Light Buddha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135504561}}<ref>Also written as {{ill|日月燈明佛|ja|日月燈明佛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/日月燈明佛|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135504561}} or {{ill|日月燈明仏|ja|日月燈明仏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/日月燈明仏|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}</ref><ref name="koj"/>.
==Place Names== * {{ill|Hachiōji|ja|八王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji|1=Hachiōji (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11391544}} – A city in Tokyo Metropolis. ** {{ill|Motohachiōji-chō|ja|元八王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motohachiōji-chō|1=Moto-Hachiōjimachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11387784}} – Location of {{ill|Hachiōji Shrine (Hachiōji)|ja|八王子神社 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji Shrine (Hachiōji)|1=Hachiōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q132042040}} (formerly Hachiōji Gongen), the origin of the name of {{ill|Hachiōji Castle|en|Hachiōji Castle|qid=Q2969389|lt=Hachiōji Castle|1=Hachiōji Castle}}, from which the city name is also derived. ** The Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism's transport bureau symbol as shown on vehicle {{ill|Vehicle registration plates of Japan|en|Vehicle registration plates of Japan|qid=Q1442604|lt=Japanese license plates|1=Vehicle registration plates of Japan}}. It refers to the {{ill|Hachiōji Motor Vehicle Inspection and Registration Office|ja|八王子自動車検査登録事務所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji Motor Vehicle Inspection and Registration Office|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東京運輸支局|1=Tokyo Transport Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11525180}} of the {{ill|Tokyo Transport Bureau|ja|東京運輸支局|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Transport Bureau|1=Tokyo Transport Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11525180}}, serving Hachiōji, {{ill|Ōme, Tokyo|en|Ōme, Tokyo|qid=Q237683|lt=Ōme, Tokyo|1=Ōme, Tokyo}}, {{ill|Hino, Tokyo|en|Hino, Tokyo|qid=Q236197|lt=Hino|1=Hino, Tokyo}}, {{ill|Fussa, Tokyo|en|Fussa, Tokyo|qid=Q317813|lt=Fussa|1=Fussa, Tokyo}}, {{ill|Hamura, Tokyo|en|Hamura, Tokyo|qid=Q270465|lt=Hamura|1=Hamura, Tokyo}}, {{ill|Akiruno, Tokyo|en|Akiruno, Tokyo|qid=Q240480|lt=Akiruno|1=Akiruno, Tokyo}}, and {{ill|Nishitama District, Tokyo|en|Nishitama District, Tokyo|qid=Q1048689|lt=Nishitama District|1=Nishitama District}}. * {{ill|Hachiōji Hills|ja|八王子丘陵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji Hills|1=Hachiōji Hills|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q55528405}} – A ridge stretching northwest to southeast from {{ill|Kiryū, Gunma|en|Kiryū, Gunma|qid=Q634022|lt=Kiryū|1=Kiryū, Gunma}} to {{ill|Ōta, Gunma|en|Ōta, Gunma|qid=Q386179|lt=Ōta, Gunma|1=Ōta, Gunma}} in Gunma Prefecture. Includes {{ill|Hachiōji Shrine|ja|八王子神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji Shrine|1=Hachioji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11391618}}, Hinatayama Nihashira Shrine (deities: {{ill|Izanagi|en|Izanagi|qid=Q813858|lt=Izanagi|1=Izanagi}} and {{ill|Izanami|en|Izanami|qid=Q682306|lt=Izanami|1=Izanami}}; recorded in "Gunsonshi 15 Nitta District"), and {{ill|Kamo Shrine (Kiryū)|ja|賀茂神社 (桐生市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Shrine (Kiryū)|1=Kamo Shrine (Kiryu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11634952}}.
===Other Areas=== ; Kantō Region :* {{ill|Hachiōji, Saitama|ja|八王子 (さいたま市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji, Saitama|1=Hachiōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17218473}} – Central Ward, {{ill|Saitama (city)|en|Saitama (city)|qid=Q134635|lt=Saitama, Saitama|1=Saitama (city)}}, Saitama Prefecture ; ; Kōshin'etsu Region :* {{ill|Hachiōji, Nagaoka|ja|小国町八王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji, Nagaoka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – {{ill|Oguni, Niigata|ja|小国町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oguni, Niigata|1=Oguni, Niigata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q125925746}}, {{ill|Nagaoka, Niigata|en|Nagaoka, Niigata|qid=Q540312|lt=Nagaoka|1=Nagaoka, Niigata}}, Niigata Prefecture ; ; Tōkai Region :* {{ill|Hachiōji-chō (Seto)|ja|八王子町 (瀬戸市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji-chō (Seto)|1=Hachiōji-chō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q106301664}} – {{ill|Seto, Aichi|en|Seto, Aichi|qid=Q499493|lt=Seto, Aichi|1=Seto, Aichi}}, Aichi Prefecture :* {{ill|Hachiōji, Kōnan|ja|安良町八王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji, Kōnan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安良町 (江南市)|1=Yasurachō, Konan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q131932361}} – {{ill|Yasurachō|ja|安良町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasurachō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kōnan, Aichi|en|Kōnan, Aichi|qid=Q820496|lt=Kōnan, Aichi|1=Kōnan, Aichi}}, Aichi Prefecture :* {{ill|Hachiōji-chō (Tahara)|ja|八王子町 (田原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji-chō (Tahara)|1=Hachiōji-chō (Tahara)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q28057475}} – {{ill|Tahara, Aichi|en|Tahara, Aichi|qid=Q501891|lt=Tahara|1=Tahara, Aichi}}, Aichi Prefecture ; ; Kinki Region :* {{ill|Hachiōji-chō (Yokkaichi)|ja|八王子町 (四日市市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji-chō (Yokkaichi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – {{ill|Yokkaichi|en|Yokkaichi|qid=Q26410|lt=Yokkaichi|1=Yokkaichi}}, Mie Prefecture :* {{ill|Hachiōji-chō (Kyoto)|ja|八王子町 (京都市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji-chō (Kyoto)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – {{ill|Shimogyō-ku, Kyoto|en|Shimogyō-ku, Kyoto|qid=Q1077022|lt=Shimogyō-ku|1=Shimogyō-ku, Kyoto}}, {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|qid=Q34600|lt=Kyoto|1=Kyoto}}, Kyoto Prefecture :* {{ill|Hachiōji (Yawata)|ja|上津屋八王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji (Yawata)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – {{ill|Kōzuya|ja|上津屋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōzuya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yawata|en|Yawata|qid=Q260923|lt=Yawata, Kyoto|1=Yawata}}, Kyoto Prefecture ; ; Chūgoku Region :* {{ill|Hachioji-chō (Kurashiki)|ja|八王寺町 (倉敷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji-chō (Kurashiki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Part of {{ill|Nakasu District (Kurashiki)|ja|中洲地区 (倉敷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakasu District (Kurashiki)|1=Nakasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11366516}}, Kurashiki, Okayama Prefecture :* {{ill|Hachiōji-chō (Ube)|ja|八王子町 (宇部市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji-chō (Ube)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – {{ill|Ube, Yamaguchi|en|Ube, Yamaguchi|qid=Q468765|lt=Ube|1=Ube, Yamaguchi}}, Yamaguchi Prefecture :* {{ill|Hachiōji (Hōfu)|ja|八王子 (防府市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji (Hōfu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – {{ill|Hōfu|en|Hōfu|qid=Q502209|lt=Hōfu|1=Hōfu}}, Yamaguchi Prefecture
===Geography=== * {{ill|Mount Hachiōji (disambiguation)|ja|八王子山 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mount Hachiōji (disambiguation)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八王子山|1=Mount Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11391570}} – Various mountains across Japan
==Other Uses== * {{ill|Hachiōji Castle|en|Hachiōji Castle|qid=Q2969389|lt=Hachiōji Castle|1=Hachiōji Castle}} – A castle from the 16th century in Motohachiōji-chō, Hachiōji, Tokyo. Named in reference to Hachiōji Gongen and the source of the city name. * {{ill|6612 Hachioji|ja|八王子 (小惑星)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/6612 Hachioji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=6612 Hachioji|qid=Q638596}} – An asteroid named after Hachiōji City. * {{ill|Hachiōji Junior High School (disambiguation)|ja|八王子中学校 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji Junior High School (disambiguation)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八王子中学校|1=Hachioji Junior High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11391555}} * {{ill|Hachiōji High School (disambiguation)|ja|八王子高等学校 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji High School (disambiguation)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八王子高等学校|1=Hachiōji High School (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q23996947}} * The surname '''Hachiōji''' (also 八王寺, 八王地, 八黄地) is used in Japanese. * {{ill|Hachiōji-P|ja|八王子P|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji-P|1=HACHIOUJI-P|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q48750677}} – A male musician known for producing VOCALOID music.
===Railways=== * {{ill|Hachiōji・Ōme|ja|はちおうじ・おうめ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji・Ōme|1=Hachiōji and Ōme|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5366279}} – A limited express train operated by {{ill|East Japan Railway Company|en|East Japan Railway Company|qid=Q499071|lt=JR East|1=East Japan Railway Company}} on the Chūō Main Line, replacing the former home liner "Chūō Liner." * {{ill|Hachiōji Station|en|Hachiōji Station|qid=Q800868|lt=Hachiōji Station|1=Hachiōji Station}} – JR East station in Hachiōji City on the Chūō Main Line, also the terminus of the {{ill|Hachikō Line|en|Hachikō Line|qid=Q1372071|lt=Hachikō Line|1=Hachikō Line}} and terminus of the {{ill|Yokohama Line|en|Yokohama Line|qid=Q1369102|lt=Yokohama Line|1=Yokohama Line}}. * {{ill|Nishi-Hachiōji Station|en|Nishi-Hachiōji Station|qid=Q500790|lt=Nishi-Hachiōji Station|1=Nishi-Hachiōji Station}} – A Chūō Main Line station in the same city, west of Hachiōji Station. * {{ill|Kita-Hachiōji Station|en|Kita-Hachiōji Station|qid=Q844347|lt=Kita-Hachiōji Station|1=Kita-Hachiōji Station}} – A Hachikō Line station in the same city, north of Hachiōji Station. * {{ill|Hachiōji-Minamino Station|en|Hachiōji-Minamino Station|qid=Q844693|lt=Hachiōji-Minamino Station|1=Hachiōji-Minamino Station}} – A Yokohama Line station, two stops south of Hachiōji Station. * {{ill|Keiō-hachiōji Station|en|Keiō-hachiōji Station|qid=Q906143|lt=Keiō-Hachiōji Station|1=Keiō-hachiōji Station}} – A {{ill|Keio Corporation|en|Keio Corporation|qid=Q1332506|lt=Keiō Corporation|1=Keio Corporation}} station about five minutes' walk from JR Hachiōji Station. * {{ill|Ise-Hachiōji Station|ja|伊勢八王子駅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise-Hachiōji Station|1=Ise-Hachiōji Station|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11378944}} – A {{ill|Kintetsu Railway|en|Kintetsu Railway|qid=Q1531085|lt=Kintetsu|1=Kintetsu Railway}} station that existed until 1974 in Hachiōji, Yokkaichi City, Mie Prefecture. * {{ill|Hachiōji Line|ja|八王子線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji Line|1=Hachiōji Line|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11391625}} – Such as the {{ill|Yokkaichi Asunarou Railway Hachiōji Line|en|Yokkaichi Asunarou Railway Hachiōji Line|qid=Q6414360|lt=Yokkaichi Asunarou Railway Hachiōji Line|1=Yokkaichi Asunarou Railway Hachiōji Line}}.
==References== {{refhelp}} {{reflist}}
==See Also== * {{ill|Prefix Hachiō|ja|八王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefix Hachiō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Hachiōji Temple|ja|八王寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji Temple|1=Hachiōji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q18989638}} {{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|八王子|version=104372143|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[uk:%D0%A5%D0%B0%D1%82%D1%96%D0%BE%D0%B4%D0%B7%D1%96]] [[ja:八王子]]
